_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the uninitialized-DataTable (branch 1) of the excel-activities/write-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (NullReferenceException at WriteRangeX on null DataTable argument) → jobs logs (preceding `If File.Exists` branch returned False because the source workbook was missing, so the Then-branch Read Range was skipped and dtSource was never assigned) → workflow source. The skipped-If + null variable is the smoking gun.
